name: Ramtin Zargari Marandi, PhD
title: Data Scientist & Research Engineer | Expert in AI | Business and Entrepreneurship with AI | MLOps Expert | Healthcare Applications
bio: Senior data scientist and AI engineer with a PhD in biomedical engineering. Over the past decade, I have contributed to designing and developing several AI systems, using genetic and clinical data, as well as implementing scalable, efficient software solutions for complex data workflows. I have extensive experience with Python, R, and cloud-based platforms, along with MLOps best practices for deploying and managing machine learning models in production.

experience.title: MLOps Engineer
experience.description: Engineered and deployed production-grade AI/ML solutions for insurance automation, including LLMs. Automated end-to-end model lifecycles using CI/CD and containerized microservices. Aligned AI development with regulatory standards, ensuring compliance, monitoring, and reproducibility.

experience.title: Postdoctoral Researcher
experience.description:
• Developed an open-source Python framework (medical artificial intelligence toolbox - MAIT) for ML workflows, enhancing model interpretability and reproducibility.
• Created the ExplaineR CRAN package, leveraging SHAP for explainable AI.
• Designed and implemented ML models in international cohort studies, emphasizing patient safety while adhering to responsible AI guidelines.
• Streamlined reproducible research using Docker, GIT, and HPC clusters for GPU-based jobs.
• Managed Agile project milestones with Azure DevOps.
• Conducted research on precision medicine and causal ML in infectious disease, microbiome, oncology, and clinical microbiology.
• Contributed to teaching, supervision, and grant writing.

experience.title: Research Assistant
experience.description: • Developed an NLP-integrated survey platform for sentiment analysis.

experience.title: PhD Fellow
experience.description:
• Designed an ML-powered biofeedback system for personalized fatigue reduction.
• Conducted research on cardiac signal processing and ergonomics using motion capture systems.

experience.title: Visiting Lecturer and Research Assistant
experience.company: Iran University of Science and Technology
experience.description:
• Conducted research on multimodal emotion recognition using EEG and other physiological signals.
• Delivered undergraduate courses in electrical engineering fundamentals and digital electronics.

experience.title: Technical Consultant (Freelance)
experience.description: • Provided R&D consulting in energy efficiency (smart lighting), healthcare engineering (automation of medical data handling), and sustainable design (urban utility tunnels), primarily for training courses and seminars served for municipalities.
